calendar.matters:
Petition For Determination Of Lost Heir
Off Calendar Nov-03-2015 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Steven Strain for the Trustees.

The Court stated that this was filed as a trust matter and asked why it was not filed in San Diego. Mr. Strain stated that there are 4 co-trustees and that it is currently being administered in San Diego. The Court stated that if venue were proper here it is not sure that this is the correct way to proceed and that it is not appropriate for the case to proceed here. The petition for determination of lost heir was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
